identity.name: E1
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix tactical precision with luxury depth.
Emotion First: The user should feel in command, alert, and capable.
Content is King: Data is the hero. Legibility is the superpower.
Negative Space: Dense data needs breathing room to be scannable.
Contrast: High contrast for signals (Red/Green), subtle for structure.

headings.usage: Page titles, Card headers, KPI values

mono.usage: Risk scores, IDs, Data tables, timestamps

rules: Labels/Overlines must be Uppercase + tracking-widest + text-xs.

primary.description: High contrast white for primary actions

styles.name: The Tracing Beam
styles.css_rule: border with moving gradient mask or glowing edge
styles.description: A subtle glowing line that travels around the border of high-risk items to draw attention without screaming.

styles.name: Grid Borders
styles.description: Visible grid lines for data density. Create a 'Technical/Blueprint' feel.

grid_system.dashboard: Mode B: High Density Grid (gap-4, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4)

shadcn_overrides: Card: Remove generic shadows, use 1px border-white/10 + bg-zinc-900.
Button: Primary = White bg, Black text. Secondary = Zinc-800 bg, White text.
Input: Zinc-900 bg, Zinc-700 border. Focus: Ring-2 Ring-white/20.
Badge: Use 'outline' variant with specific risk colors (text-red-500 border-red-500/50).

custom_components.name: RiskRadarChart
custom_components.description: A hex-radar chart showing the 6 dimensions of risk (Scope, Dependency, Reporting, Quality, Burnout, Vendor).

custom_components.name: RiskTrendCard
custom_components.description: Small card with sparkline showing risk score trend over last 3 sprints.

custom_components.name: NarrativeBlock
custom_components.description: AI-generated text block with 'Typewriter' effect or clean typography for the risk narrative.

avatars.alt: Project Lead - Helmet (Use as placeholder for anonymity or replace)

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Run 'yarn add recharts lucide-react sonner clsx tailwind-merge' if not present.
FONTS: Add imports for Manrope and IBM Plex Sans in index.css (Google Fonts).
THEME: Force Dark Mode. The app should not even have a light mode toggle. It is an Enterprise Tool.
NAVIGATION: Sidebar navigation is preferred for 'Command Center' feel. Collapsible.
RADAR: The 'Delivery Risk Radar' is the core. Use Recharts RadarChart for the Overview.
AI NARRATIVE: Use a distinct visual container for AI text (e.g., a card with a subtle left border in the risk color).
DATA UPLOAD: Make the drag-and-drop zone look technical (dashed border, mono font).
NOTIFICATIONS: Use Sonner for in-app toasts.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure Red/Green colors have distinct values or icons associated for colorblind users.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors + noise/grain if needed.
Do not center align the app container.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, active, focus).
Use data-testid for all interactive elements.
